title: Halloween Candy Bowl - Decorative Bowl Home Decorations - Decorative Festive Platter Plate for Club Desk Kitchen Holiday Table Party Food Home
features: Spooky Designs For Treats: Showcasing 3 eerie designs, including ghost, bat, and pumpkin, this plate set provides a creative and thematic approach to presenting snacks and treats at Halloween gatherings

Kid-Friendly Halloween Designs: Designed with kids in mind, this candy bowl combines non-scary elements and child-friendly fun, making it a good addition to homes and classrooms while enhancing the Halloween festival spirit effortlessly
Multi-Use: Holds finger food, popcorn, and candy effortlessly, suitable for dinner gatherings or Halloween parties, a good choice for party dining that complements your hosting needs seamlessly
Great Durability: Crafted from sturdy material, this candy bowl resists fading and retains its shape over time, ensuring long-lasting use for Halloween and other occasions without wear or damage

Applicable Scene: A must-have Halloween candy bowl, ideal for home decor and party use, enhancing your Halloween night with its versatile design and festive appeal, perfect for holding treats and themed decorations alike
description: Transform your holiday hosting experience with this versatile candy bowl, designed for festive occasions. It serves as both a decorative piece and functional platter for food placement. Suitable for Halloween parties, home kitchens, or club events, it ensures easy access to treats while enhancing the overall ambiance of your setup. Specifications: Material: PP Product Size: Pumpkin: 13x14cm/5.12x5.51in Ghost: 15.6x11.6cm/6.14x4.56in Bat: 10x18cm/3.94x7.08in Packing List: Halloween Candy Bowl*1 Note: Due to the different light and screen settings, the color of the product may be slightly different from the picture. Due to the different manual measurement, please allow 1-2 cm size difference.
